answer: The zip code with the highest number of Austin code complaint cases is 78758, with 6,547 cases. Other areas with high counts include 78741 (5,500 cases), 78745 (5,052 cases), and 78704 (4,966 cases). In total, 10,307 cases were recorded across all zip codes during the analyzed period.
